At MaxHealth Hospital, we are dedicated to delivering healthcare excellence with compassion, integrity, and innovation. As a valued part of Riphah Healthcare Services, we maintain the highest standards of medical care while ensuring patient trust and comfort. Our hospital offers a comprehensive range of medical services under one roof, including a state-of-the-art Cath Lab, advanced diagnostics, surgical care, and specialized treatment departments. We are committed not only to treating illnesses but also to promoting overall well-being and healthier communities. At MaxHealth, every patient is our priority, and every life matters. We invite you to experience healthcare that truly cares.
Dr. Sikandar Shahzad Chief Operating Officer (COO) MaxHealth Hospital
I appreciate your hospital really good environment and excellent patient care. You are continuously handle patient treatment wonderfully. Thanks for your great service. Please enjoy the chocolates.

You can request an appointment online through our website or call our reception desk directly. Please note that online requests are reviewed by our team, and your appointment will be confirmed via phone call or message.

We provide a full range of dental services, including general dentistry, orthodontics (braces and aligners), dental implants, cosmetic dentistry, pediatric dentistry, root canal treatments, oral surgery, and preventive care. Please check our services section for details.
Yes, our hospital is on the panel of several leading insurance companies in Pakistan. Please contact our reception for the updated list of insurance partners and coverage details.

meta.generator: Powered by Slider Revolution 6.7.34 - responsive, Mobile-Friendly Slider Plugin for WordPress with comfortable drag and drop interface.

headings.text: Key Features of Our Emergency Department:
Sign Up To Get Latest Updates

content_blocks: Medical emergencies can happen at any time—day or night. The  Emergency Department at Maxhealth Hospital  is committed to delivering  timely, compassionate, and expert medical care when you need it most .

Our top priority is to ensure patients receive immediate and effective treatment. The emergency team—consisting of  board-certified doctors, experienced nurses, and trained paramedical staff—is available 24/7  to handle all types of medical emergencies.
In addition to general emergency care, we also provide  specialized emergency services  for  obstetric  and  psychiatric emergencies , ensuring comprehensive support across all medical domains.
24/7 Availability of Emergency Physicians and Consultants
ESI (Emergency Severity Index) Triage System  to prioritize care based on clinical urgency
State-of-the-Art Equipment  including: Heart Monitors Defibrillators Ventilators
Specialized Areas  for trauma care, resuscitation, and observation
Training Facility  for doctors pursuing  FCPS Emergency Medicine Certification

Recognized as one of the leading emergency care providers in  Islamabad’s G-8 Markaz , Maxhealth Hospital takes great pride in offering  rapid response, expert diagnosis, and high-quality emergency interventions —all in a modern, patient-focused environment.
